/usr/sbin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/image_viewer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/image_viewer.dir/src/app/usage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_viewer.dir/src/image/image_displayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_viewer.dir/src/image/image_format.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_viewer.dir/src/image/image_info.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_viewer.dir/src/image/image_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_viewer.dir/src/image/image_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_viewer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_viewer.dir/src/other/math2d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_viewer.dir/src/sdl/displayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_viewer.dir/src/sdl/window.cpp.o -o image_viewer  /usr/lib/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.3200.68 /usr/lib/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib/libSDL2_image.so
